caption: A man with light-colored skin, glasses, and a large, pointed silver wig sits in a studio setting. He is wearing a white button-down shirt with a red patterned bowtie and tan suspenders, and he wears large black headphones over his ears. He is positioned behind a black professional microphone. In the background, a wall is decorated with numerous framed photographs and various pieces of clothing on hangers. A logo featuring a microphone icon and the text "GOSS TALK JOY PODCAST" appears as a watermark on the screen. Throughout the sequence, the man remains mostly stationary, gazing slightly to the side with a neutral expression, though he subtly shifts his head and begins to move his mouth as if speaking toward the end of the clip.
